violations.text: Logs of deli meat were observed not marked with the date of opening. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Establishment is to start date marking logs of deli meat when food items are opened. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2-door reach-in refrigerator and the floor and shelving in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
